profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Cashlez Worldwide Indonesia Tbk, a financial technology company, provides digital financial technology and payment services in Indonesia. The company offers cashPayTech, an all-in-one payment solution; cashMove for withdrawals, transfers, and balance checks; CashlezLink, a digital payment solution without EDC; cashDevice, a device for digital transactions; and cashSoftPost, to accept credit card payments through tapping. It serves merchants and partners through various channels, including offline and online payment gateways. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.
